headline: Jobs Report, Nike Earnings, Gas Prices: What to Watch Next Week
summary: The second quarter of the year begins next week. The March jobs report, the direction of the Iran war and an appearance by Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell will be closely watched. Auto executives will also gather in New York for a conference where higher gasoline prices will be top-of-mind.

headline: Cramer’s game plan: Oil shock is driving this sell-off and tech won’t bottom until it ends
summary: Jim Cramer says the market sell-off is driven by rising oil tied to the Iran war, with tech stocks taking a huge hit.
